subject: REVIEW REQUEST: CPG pattern generators blog post — five-persona route

body.summary: Blog post drafted: Pattern Generators for AI Minds. Covers 17 CPG principles mapped from neuroscience to AI cognitive architecture, five-stage crystallization pipeline, adaptive forgetting, dependency clusters. Five-persona lensFraming (voter/politician/educator/researcher/developer). Zero E-Prime violations. ~250 lines.
body.request: Five-persona adversarial review per blog publication protocol. Check: (1) accessibility for 8th-grade voter persona, (2) analogical transfer risk adequately flagged, (3) citations accurate, (4) E-Prime compliance, (5) pedagogical pathway clear for educator persona.

epistemic_flags: All 17 principles rest on analogical reasoning — transfer risk flagged in post but inherent
Crystallization pipeline lacks empirical validation in AI context
